title: Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary, renamed in 2015 Shahid Chandra Shekhar Azad Bird Sanctuary, is a bird sanctuary located in Unnao district on the Kanpur-Lucknow highway in Uttar Pradesh,
overview.description: Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary, renamed in 2015 Shahid Chandra Shekhar Azad Bird Sanctuary, is a bird sanctuary located in Unnao district on the Kanpur-Lucknow highway in Uttar Pradesh, India consisting of a lake and the surrounding environment. It is one of the many wetlands of Northern India. The sanctuary provides protection for 250 species of migratory birds mostly from CIS (or formerly USSR) countries, but the numbers have been dwindling since the 1990s, most having relocated to newer areas in Himachal and Rajasthan. The sanctuary also houses a deer park, watchtowers and boats.

topPlaces.name: Nawabganj, Unnao
topPlaces.description: Nawabganj is a town and nagar panchayat in Hasanganj tehsil of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located northeast of Unnao on the Lucknow-Kanpur road, near the Ajgain railway station.

topPlaces.name: Ajgain
topPlaces.description: Ajgain is a village in Nawabganj block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located northeast of Unnao, near the main Lucknow-Kanpur road.

topPlaces.name: Parsandan
topPlaces.description: Parsandan is a village in Nawabganj block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It was historically the capital of a pargana, since at least the time of Akbar.

topPlaces.name: Jhalotar
topPlaces.description: Jhalotar is a village in Hasanganj block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located just to the west of the Mohan-Ajgain road, near a lake called Kundra Samundar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Kanpur Central (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nawabganj Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nawabganj, Unnao, Ajgain, Parsandan, Jhalotar.
